rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relation to Educ. Code §11.179, which governs alcoholic beverage sales in leased school district performing arts facilities.
quote: Sec. 11.179. SALE OF ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES IN CERTAIN LEASED DISTRICT FACILITIES.
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses an entirely unrelated subject (alcohol sales in leased school facilities) and contains no reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
